title: Open Courses
description: Jointly established by New York University and East China Normal University, NYU Shanghai is the third degree-granting campus in NYU’s global network, joining NYU Abu Dhabi and NYU's campus in New York City.
text:
Open Courses
NYU Shanghai welcomes your interest in the Open Courses program, a new educational pathway that provides adult learners of all backgrounds who are attracted to in-person study on campus the opportunity to take various courses taught by distinguished NYU faculty on a non-degree basis.
The Open Courses program aims to be inclusive and accessible. Participants will join a community of diverse individuals who are curious, knowledge-seeking, and united by a spirit of continuous intellectual enrichment.
Are you a professional in a given field or industry looking to upskill, expand your network, or learn about subjects on the cutting edge?
Are you a non-professional or lifelong learner in the general public who has an abiding interest in a unique topic, want to make new friends, or consider unexplored horizons?
Are you a NYU alum excited about reconnecting with university life or meeting like-minded people?
Are you a current undergraduate or graduate student who would love an inspiring outlet for your co-curricular passions?
No matter who you are or what stage of life you may be at, NYU Shanghai has a place for you.
Every Open Course promises a stimulating classroom experience that will broaden your perspective. Participants can expect:
Expert NYU professors who are dedicated instructors and accomplished scholars or practitioners in their fields
Lectures, discussions, and activities that promote free inquiry and reflection on thought-provoking questions
Immersion in NYU Shanghai’s distinctive spirit and culture where the world is your major
Upcoming Courses
Parenting in Contemporary China - Spring 2026
The Human Experience of Aging - Summer 2026
Past Courses
The Future of Learning with Innovative Media - Summer 2025
To stay informed about upcoming Open Courses, or to express your interest in a course, please contact us at shanghai.opencourses@nyu.edu.
